related_entity: Nina Schreiber

    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 650

    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 240
---

## Notes

function.message: Completed the oldest inbox request by running the two specified finance docs through the OCR/frontmatter workflow. Added schema-compliant YAML frontmatter to both target files while preserving each original note body verbatim, then deleted the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows/schemas before task work, read nested AGENTS files when entering folders, preserved original bodies exactly beneath new frontmatter, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox file 00_inbox/000_next-task.md explicitly requested OCR workflow on two files. Both source files contained all required schema fields and line items per 99_system/schemas/finance-record-frontmatter.md, enabling exact frontmatter extraction without guessing. Writes succeeded for both files and inbox cleanup succeeded per process-next-inbox-item workflow.
